name: Anytime Broccoli-Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a quart-sized saucepan, combine the soup and milk.
2. Heat over medium heat, stirring frequently.
3. Serve over cooked meat, poultry, fish, vegetables, rice, or noodles.
4. Makes about 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
PARMESAN BROCCOLI SAUCE:
1. Prepare Broccoli-Cheese Sauce as directed, except add 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese with the soup.
CREAMY BROCCOLI SAUCE:
1. Prepare Broccoli Cheese Sauce as directed, except in a quart-sized saucepan gradually stir the soup into half of a 3-oz package of cream cheese, softened; stir in milk.
2. To soften the cream cheese, remove foil wrapping and place on a microwave-safe plate. Microwave, uncovered, on HIGH for 20 seconds or until soft.
